description: You are a wildlife biologist conducting a conservation status audit in QField using the wildlife_species_audit.gpkg project, which contains bird species observation records from Iowa for the USFWS Regional Priority Species Program. Update the conservation_status field in the species_observations layer to match the IUCN Red List 2023 designations (LC, NT, VU, EN, CR, EW, or EX). For any species classified as Near Threatened (NT) or higher, add a monitoring justification to the priority_note field. Save all changes to the project.
